query:
SELECT 
  u.periodLabel,
  SUM(i.amount)/100 as total_sales
FROM delivery_item_sales i
JOIN delivery_sales_uploads u ON i.uploadId = u.id
WHERE u.periodStart >= '2026-04-01' AND u.periodStart < '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY u.periodLabel;

  SUM(i.amount)/100 as total_sales

JOIN delivery_sales_uploads u ON i.uploadId = u.id
